texto: WEST SALEM ~ October 2011A sudden vision, fraught with malevolence and darkness, obscured her sight. The face of a menacing figure turned from the shadows of his grisly handiwork and stared at Sorcha.Her muscles tensed. By the Goddess, could he see her?Please! No!She wanted to scream, to run, but the vision ensnared her into the horrific moment like a fly in a spider's web.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Chérie De Sues: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “WEST SALEM ~ October 2011A sudden vision, fraught with malevolence and darkness, obscured her sig…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, cherie-de-sues, fae pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e reflexao-noturna.
